creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 202395
lang/smlnj poudriere build log with configure error

I'm getting a configure error with the lang/smlnj port when building in poudriere on 12/stable.  In particular it is an error with respect to configuring asdl which I have no idea how to fix.
Below is the relevant part of the build log error. Thanks in advance.

Scheduling library $mlyacc-tool.cm/mlyacc-tool.cm to be built as /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/smlnj/work/smlnj-110.84/lib/mlyacc-tool.cm/.cm/x86-unix/mlyacc-tool.cm
